findFirstTile(Tile.State) - Method in class edu.bu.labs.lab1.Maze
Searches left->right, up->down, and returns the first tile with the same state as the passed state argument.

getCurrentHp() - Method in class edu.bu.labs.lab1.Unit
 
getCurrentPosition() - Method in class edu.bu.labs.lab1.Unit
 
getDx() - Method in enum class edu.bu.labs.lab1.Direction
The change of x for this direction... e.g. -1 for going left 1 column, and +1 for going right 1 column, or 0.
getDy() - Method in enum class edu.bu.labs.lab1.Direction
The change of y for this direction... e.g. -1 for going up 1 row, and +1 for going down 1 row, or 0.

Returns the tile at the next direction, as if we took 1 step in the given direction.
